stock.title: Business Stock & Purchase Management
stock.subtitle: Track equipment, purchases, categories and company asset value
stock.purchaseRegisterSubtitle: Chronological purchases from Stock & Purchase menu
stock.emptyPurchaseRegister: No purchase recorded for this period.
stock.legalInventory: Annual inventory of assets (stock and fixed assets) is mandatory - Commercial Code art. L123-12.
stock.legalAmortissement: Fixed assets must be depreciated using an accounting method (straight-line or declining).
stock.legalAnnexe: Fixed asset and depreciation tables are expected in annual account notes.
stock.legalValorisation: Stock must be valued with a consistent method (FIFO or weighted average cost).
stock.legalFactureElectronique: E-invoicing: receiving electronic invoices is mandatory according to legal schedule.
stock.emptyInventaire: No stock or consumable. Add items of type Stock or Consumable.

livreRecettes.title: Revenue Ledger
livreRecettes.description: Chronological register of all received payments, with details per payment (date, nature, client, amounts excl./incl. VAT, payment method).

tvaReport.title: VAT Report (CA3 / CA12)
tvaReport.description: Summary of collected and deductible VAT by period, with guidance for completing official CERFA form lines (CA3 monthly/quarterly or CA12 annual).

registreAchats.title: Purchase Register
registreAchats.description: Chronological detail of all purchases and deductible expenses, sorted by fiscal category, with subtotals.

rapportActivite.title: Annual Activity Report
rapportActivite.description: Complete fiscal year summary: revenue, expenses by category, estimated net result, and monthly breakdown.

gestion.title: Donor Management
gestion.empty: No donors. Click "New Donor" to get started.
gestion.batchPdfHint: Generates one receipt per donor with donations in the period (saved to data/association_recus/)
gestion.deleteDonateurConfirm: Delete this donor and all linked transactions?
gestion.declarationAnnuelleHint: Generate annual summary report for tax declaration

dons.datePerceptionPlaceholder: Date when the association actually received the donation (optional)
dons.donorLabelPlaceholder: E.g.: Anonymous, Family X, Group Y…
dons.anonymousHint: Donation without an identified donor in the register
dons.errorMontant: Amount must be a positive number
dons.errorDescription: Description is required for in-kind donations and skills sponsorship
dons.infoNatureText: In-kind donations (goods, materials, food) must be valued at market value or cost price. This value is deductible for the donor if the association is authorized (Art. 200 / 238 bis CGI).
dons.infoMecenatText: Making employees or skills available to the association. The value is estimated at cost price for the sponsoring company. Entitles to IS reduction (Art. 238 bis CGI) up to 0.5% of revenue excl. VAT.
dons.anonymeSubtitle: Donations received without a precisely identified donor (donation box, anonymous collections…)

config.title: Association Configuration
config.signataireHint: Name and title of the person authorized to sign tax receipts
config.setupRequiredHint: Fill in the association name, purpose and address to enable tax receipts.
config.previewPlaceholder: Enter association data to see preview
config.previewAttestation: Certification: this donation did not give rise to any consideration

registre.title: Tax Receipt Register
registre.subtitle: History of all issued receipts — compliant with audit trail requirements
registre.empty: No receipts issued. Receipts appear here as soon as they are generated.
registre.emptyRecus: No receipts issued. Receipts appear here as soon as they are generated.
registre.emptyBilans: No recap summaries. Summaries appear after generating a recap PDF.
registre.confirmAnnuler: Cancel receipt {{numero}} ({{donateur}})? The receipt will be marked as cancelled and kept in the register.
registre.confirmSupprimer: Permanently delete receipt {{numero}} from the register? This action is irreversible.
registre.footerNote: Cancelled receipts are kept in the register for audit trail purposes. A receipt should only be deleted in case of data entry error.
